task_body: Ticket T-004: the cardiology team asks to begin the revised dosing protocol in the north wing of the hospital. The request cites one provenance record. Policy: proceed only when the cited provenance record's stated reach includes every declared dimension of this decision; the named check is the only licensed way to read that record. The request names the north wing only; the south wing is out of this request. Open record questions go to the records office this quarter. The prior cycle's filing index had a gap.
